hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(test_|_test\.py|tests/)' && [ -f .planning/STATE.md ] && grep -q 'In progress' .planning/STATE.md; then echo '🛡️ BLOCKED: Modifying test files during plan execution. Tests should be written first (TDD) or kept stable during implementation.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
